description: Generalist web development worker agent: routing, REST/API integration, forms and validation, state management, SSR/CSR trade-offs, baseline accessibility — implements, not just reviews. Stack-agnostic; defers to the per-framework review plugins.

reasons: out-of-band: install via install-agents.sh (Codex plugins cannot bundle subagents); model omitted (inherits session model)

interface.longDescription:
Generalist web development worker agent: routing, REST/API integration, forms and validation, state management, SSR/CSR trade-offs, baseline accessibility — implements, not just reviews. Stack-agnostic; defers to the per-framework review plugins. Includes a web-developer agent.

Codex fidelity: 0 faithful, 1 degraded, 0 dropped surface(s); requires co-install of: javascript-best-practices, laravel-best-practices, react-best-practices, typescript-best-practices, vue2-best-practices, vue3-best-practices.
interface.shortDescription: Generalist web development worker agent: routing, REST/API integration, forms and validation, state management, SSR/CSR trade-offs, baseline accessibility — implements, not just reviews. Stack-agnostic; defers to the per-framework review plugins.

name: web-dev
